## Purpose
22 enterprise AI governance domains · operator master brief 2026-06-11.

Each domain follows the standard agent pattern:
  Supervisor + Planner + Analyst + Reviewer + Validation + Approval +
  Audit + Reporting + Learning agents.

Plus a standard MCP pattern:
  Knowledge · Data · Workflow · Security · Communication · Reporting · Governance.
